title: You Got Me
lyrics: A little bit of unnecessary things getting in the way Hey, when it's dark, when it's cold, when you need a hand to hold When you want this and you want to go away, you just need more Need a little bit of that to get your heart right back on track Yeah, you know that there's only one place you need to go to get that Anytime you tell me, baby, anytime you need that You know you got me, Leo, don't you know that you got me You know you know that you got, that you got me You know you know, you know that you got me Always I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw things you got I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw things away Hey, people are just things we can replace People are things we can find again Unique in this world, that's my view on you, baby Unique is my idea Even if the title doesn't Say what you want, it's still there in my mind Baby, I don't want others To perceive us in a way But you light my heart up, baby And when the dark comes, we'll find a way Why? Because at the end of the night I let the pillow in right beside you Sleep with you to the end of time Because you got me, baby, you know, and you know That you got me, baby, you know, you know That you got me, baby, you know, you know That you got me always Baby, you know that you got, that you got me Baby, you know that you got me Always and always and all the time Oh, when the night comes just a little bit With a fight inside us, we can lose our mind What doesn't kill us makes us stronger, you'll see Baby, you're the one I'll look at like eternity Yeah, baby, you know, yeah, you know that you got me Baby, you know that you know that you got me Baby, you know, you know that you got me Always Oh, through the time we share Baby, you know that you got me Always Wrapped up in your heart Narc! Did you say narc? He said narc! He said narc! Narc!

lyricsSegments.text: A little bit of unnecessary things getting in the way
Hey, when it's dark, when it's cold, when you need a hand to hold
When you want this and you want to go away, you just need more
Need a little bit of that to get your heart right back on track
Yeah, you know that there's only one place you need to go to get that
Anytime you tell me, baby, anytime you need that
You know you got me, Leo, don't you know that you got me
You know you know that you got, that you got me
You know you know, you know that you got me
Always
I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw things you got
I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw, I don't want to throw things away
Hey, people are just things we can replace
People are things we can find again
Unique in this world, that's my view on you, baby
Unique is my idea
Even if the title doesn't
Say what you want, it's still there in my mind
Baby, I don't want others
To perceive us in a way
But you light my heart up, baby
And when the dark comes, we'll find a way
Why? Because at the end of the night
I let the pillow in right beside you
Sleep with you to the end of time
Because you got me, baby, you know, and you know
That you got me, baby, you know, you know
That you got me, baby, you know, you know
That you got me always
Baby, you know that you got, that you got me
Baby, you know that you got me
Always and always and all the time
Oh, when the night comes just a little bit
With a fight inside us, we can lose our mind
What doesn't kill us makes us stronger, you'll see
Baby, you're the one I'll look at like eternity
Yeah, baby, you know, yeah, you know that you got me
Baby, you know that you know that you got me
Baby, you know, you know that you got me
Always

Baby, you know that you got me
Always

Narc!
